name: count_vowels
description: Counts the total number of vowels (a, e, i, o, u) in a given sentence, case-insensitive
returnDescription: Total count of vowels in the sentence
code: let count = 0; const vowels = new Set(['a','e','i','o','u']); for (let i = 0; i < sentence.length; i++) { if (vowels.has(sentence[i].toLowerCase())) count++; } return count;
creator: Ada
